basic_details.job_title: ECHS Medical Officer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Ex-Servicemen Contributory Health Scheme (ECHS) Medical Officer Notification 2026 has been released on 06 June 2026 on the official website echs.gov.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the ECHS Medical Officer Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: MBBS with minimum 3 years experience after internship
qualification.details: Medical Officer: MBBS. Work Experience Min - 03 (three) years after internship. Preferable additional qualifications in Medicine/ surgery.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for ECHS Medical Officer Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.echs.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 15-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the ECHS Medical Officer recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to receive the application for the ECHS Medical Officer recruitment is 15th June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address before this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the salary offered for the Medical Officer post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Medical Officer post will receive a salary of Rs. 95,000 per month. This is a competitive remuneration for the role.

faq.question: Q3. What is the required qualification for the Medical Officer position?
faq.answer: To be eligible for the Medical Officer post, candidates must possess an MBBS degree and have a minimum of 3 years of experience after completing their internship. Additional qualifications in Medicine or Surgery are preferable.

faq.question: Q4. How can I apply for the ECHS Medical Officer job?
faq.answer: The application process is offline. You need to download the application form from the official website, fill it correctly, attach necessary documents, and send it via post to the address mentioned in the notification before the last date.

faq.question: Q5. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the ECHS Medical Officer recruitment primarily involves an interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their performance in the interview.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for the ECHS Medical Officer post?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the ECHS Medical Officer recruitment. This makes the application process more accessible.

faq.question: Q7. Where is the ECHS Medical Officer job located?
faq.answer: The ECHS Medical Officer job is located in Bhuj, Gujarat. This provides an opportunity for candidates in this region to serve in a government health scheme.

faq.question: Q8. What is the total number of vacancies for the Medical Officer post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Medical Officer post in the Ex-Servicemen Contributory Health Scheme (ECHS) recruitment. This is a single opening for eligible candidates.

faq.question: Q9. When is the interview date for the ECHS Medical Officer recruitment?
faq.answer: The interview for the ECHS Medical Officer recruitment is scheduled to be held on 17th June 2026. Candidates should be prepared for the interview on this date.

faq.question: Q10. What is the official website for ECHS?
faq.answer: The official website for the Ex-Servicemen Contributory Health Scheme (ECHS) is www.echs.gov.in. Candidates can visit this website for more information and to download application forms.
